title: Weight change concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to entered unintentional loss, intake, appetite, swallowing and illness context without calculating malnutrition.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.6 — screening, clinical concern, weight loss, intake, and swallowing

assessment.text: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to permission and clinician-entered measurements in possible weight gain without computing or diagnosing obesity.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.17 — permission, measurements, and adult assessment

referral.text: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.
referral.rationale: Relevant only to clinician-completed context and discussion, not to generating a plan.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1–1.11.14 — results, context, intervention discussion, and referral

sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE nutrition, dietetics, consent, capacity, and referral adaptation

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Direction, intent, measured values, dates, height, intake, oedema, symptoms, pregnancy, medicines and conditions are absent.
No BMI, percentage change, diagnosis, target, diet, exercise, test or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
